data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement 'Roll-up analytics by parent account', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for roll-up analytics, yet none of the prior steps or evidence demonstrate that this requirement is met. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence provided, as the requirement is not covered by any of the prior steps or evidence.
gaps: No evidence of roll-up analytics by parent account.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the roll-up analytics by parent account.
